input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.3.2
            TITLE: refer to the design briefing template for:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.3.2: Refer to the Design Briefing template for:
S.4.3.2 Refer to the Design Briefing template for: 
a. Specific content requirements, areas and details  
b. Maximum slides that may be used per topic

final_answer: Refer to the Design Briefing template for: a. Specific content requirements, areas and details b. Maximum slides that may be used per topic
